docket_entries.description: DECLARATION AMENDED CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYU, DONGYUE
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,167.00 FILED BY LYU, DONGYUE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YIBING FUNG, CLARA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,287.00 FILED BY LYU, DONGYUE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YIBING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LYU, DONGYUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LI, YIBING FUNG, CLARA DEFENDANT YIBING LI (LANDLORD) SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $0 PRICIPAL AND $0 COSTS. DEFENDANT CLARA FUNG (CO-TENANT) SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $0 PRINCIPAL AND $0 COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED JUN-12-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FUNG, CLARA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED JUN-10-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LI, YIBING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DONGYUE LYU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS YIBING LI AND CLARA FUNG ARE PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. EXHIBITS FROM PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANTS RETAINED. (D506)
